title: Carpet LMS Addition
description: A Carpet mod extension providing extra rules
body:
An extension for [Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet) that adds a set of configurable rules and utilities focused on survival balance and technical gameplay.

This mod follows the Carpet style: features are implemented as gamerules that can be enabled, disabled, or tuned individually. Under the default configuration, vanilla behavior is not changed.

Main features include:

- **Renewable resources**: optional crafting recipes for elytra, enchanted golden apples, and sponges.
- **Block property tweaks**: configurable hardness and blast resistance for budding amethyst, vaults, and trial spawners (including explosion-proof or unbreakable variants).
- **Survival mechanics adjustments**: customizable shulker duplication behavior, minimal looting level, allay healing interval, and a fix for zombified piglin spawning in nether portals.
- **Ender pearl controls**: options to ignore entity collision or prevent teleportation based on custom names.
- **Low health spectator system**: automatically switches players to spectator mode below a configurable health threshold, with cooldown and method options.

Use this mod together with Carpet on the same Minecraft version. It is recommended to use the latest Carpet release when possible.

Documentation:
https://carpet.lms.nm.cn

Development and snapshot builds are available through GitHub Actions in the repository.
